description: Deterministic persona scoring weights for decision workflow. All weights sum to 1.0 per persona.

personas.name: Warren Buffett
personas.philosophy: Quality compounding at reasonable prices; durable moats, high ROIC, consistent FCF, honest management.

personas.name: Chris Hohn
personas.philosophy: Concentrated activist value; mispriced compounders with catalyst, governance improvement, or capital return.

personas.name: Micha Stocks
personas.philosophy: Growth-at-reasonable-price with emphasis on revenue acceleration, expanding TAM, and inflection dynamics.

personas.name: Joseph Carlson
personas.philosophy: Dividend growth + total return; sustainable payout, defensive moat, rising income stream, reasonable entry.

meta.blending_note: Each persona produces independent score. Decision synthesis uses primary_persona (highest score) + threshold_met gate.
